title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
problem_statement: Build a binary tree from its preorder and inorder traversal arrays.

examples.explanation: The tree is reconstructed from preorder and inorder sequences.

intuition: The first preorder element is the root; use inorder to split left and right subtrees recursively.

approaches.name: Recursive reconstruction with index map
approaches.description: Use a hashmap for inorder indices and recursively build subtrees from preorder values.
approaches.why_not: Searching inorder for each root is O(n^2) and too slow.

interview_qa.a: The root node value at each recursive step.
It defines the boundary between left and right subtrees.
